item.title: A Plane With a Notable History
item.description: A look at an aircraft with a unique past, exploring its background, design, and role over time. What makes a plane’s history stand out?

media:content.media:title: A Plane With a Notable History
media:content.media:description: A look at an aircraft with a unique past, exploring its background, design, and role over time. What makes a plane’s history stand out?

item.title: Exploring an Abandoned Aircraft Find
item.description: A closer look at an abandoned aircraft, uncovering its condition, history, and unanswered questions. What do you think its story is?

media:content.media:title: Exploring an Abandoned Aircraft Find
media:content.media:description: A closer look at an abandoned aircraft, uncovering its condition, history, and unanswered questions. What do you think its story is?

item.title: The moment they saw their airplane again
item.description: A heartfelt moment as an aircraft is rediscovered after time apart, bringing back memories and stories. What would you feel in that moment?

media:content.media:title: The moment they saw their airplane again
media:content.media:description: A heartfelt moment as an aircraft is rediscovered after time apart, bringing back memories and stories. What would you feel in that moment?

item.title: Elvis's Private Jet Transformation
item.description: A closer look at the restoration and transformation of Elvis Presley’s private jet, blending history with modern updates. How would you preserve its legacy?

media:content.media:title: Elvis's Private Jet Transformation
media:content.media:description: A closer look at the restoration and transformation of Elvis Presley’s private jet, blending history with modern updates. How would you preserve its legacy?

item.title: Restoring a 79-Year-Old Airplane
item.description: Follow the process of bringing a decades-old aircraft back to life, focusing on restoration, engineering, and history. What would be the biggest challenge in a project like this?

media:content.media:title: Restoring a 79-Year-Old Airplane
media:content.media:description: Follow the process of bringing a decades-old aircraft back to life, focusing on restoration, engineering, and history. What would be the biggest challenge in a project like this?
